Secrets.Name: parable/rds-proxy/admin-creds
Secrets.Description: Admin credentials used by RDS Proxy to connect to parable-prod-pg

Secrets.Name: parable/stripe/api-key
Secrets.Description: Stripe live-mode secret key used for charge capture

_note: The billing service is successfully reading its Stripe API key from Secrets Manager via the interface VPC endpoint (no NAT needed). The secret is read, authentication to Stripe is constructed correctly, but the outbound TLS connection to api.stripe.com itself times out at the ENI egress policy before it can complete.
